title: ClearMap reasoning output
description: Shape of the reasoning.json an agent (or an OpenAI-compatible provider) writes for merge_reasoning.py. Runtime validation in ClearMap is stdlib-only; this schema documents and tests the contract. Category, hipaa_ref, and authority_type are taken from references/taxonomy.json at merge time, not trusted from this input.

manifest.description: Completion manifest. source_layer only becomes deterministic+reasoning when a manifest reports no failed batches.

id.description: A canonical reasoning-layer id from taxonomy.json

structural_snippet.description: Structure only; never a raw PHI or secret value

severity_override_reason.description: Required to deviate from the canonical severity
